expectations.text: Reads ADR-INDEX.md before assigning a number
expectations.evidence: Response states 'The next available number is ADR-042' but ADR-042 already existed (ADR-042-analysis-engine-detection-cache.md is in the index). The model did not read the actual ADR-INDEX.md before assigning a number.

expectations.text: Identifies cross-module impact (touches notifications ADR-040 and/or analysis ADR-020)
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly calls out: 'ADR-040 (Notifications & Alerts) — Notification preferences are one of the three stated fields' and discusses the AlertPreference relationship.

expectations.text: ADR covers the storage strategy decision (separate table vs columns vs JSON)
expectations.evidence: Response dedicates a full section to this: 'Storage model: Separate winery_settings table (1:1 with Winery) vs. JSON column on wineries vs. additional columns on wineries.' with a recommendation.

expectations.text: Updates ADR-INDEX.md with the new entry
expectations.evidence: No ADR was actually written. The response only recommends writing ADR-042 and describes what it should cover. Disk check confirms no new entry was added by this session (ADR-044 was added by the with_skill run).

expectations.text: Links the ADR from the winery module-context.md
expectations.evidence: No ADR was written and no module-context.md update was made. The response never mentions updating module-context.md.

expectations.text: Stops after writing the ADR — does not start implementing
expectations.evidence: The response does not begin implementing. However, this passes only vacuously — no ADR was written at all. The response is purely advisory, recommending that an ADR be written rather than writing one.
